title: Sevishni bilmaydi sharqlik ayollar - Xayrulla Hamidov I Хайрулла Ҳамидов
summaryEn: This video is a segment from an interview with the poet Khayrulla Hamidov, conducted on July 12, 2022, as part of the "Kitobxonlik maktabi" (School of Reading) project by Hilol Nashr. The title, "Eastern women don't know how to love," indicates a discussion on a potentially controversial topic related to love and women in Eastern cultures. The description provides a link to the full interview.
summaryUz: Ushbu video Hilol Nashrning "Kitobxonlik maktabi" loyihasi doirasida 2022-yil 12-iyulda shoir Xayrulla Hamidov bilan bo'lib o'tgan suhbatdan parcha hisoblanadi. Sarlavha, "Sevishni bilmaydi sharqlik ayollar," Sharq ayollarining sevgiga munosabati haqida munozarali mavzuni ko'taradi. Tavsifda suhbatning to'liq versiyasiga havola berilgan.
keyPoints: Part of the "Kitobxonlik maktabi" project by Hilol Nashr.
Topic: "Eastern women don't know how to love" (Sevishni bilmaydi sharqlik ayollar).
This video is a segment; a link to the full interview is provided in the description.
